 
## 0. nieuwe resource group: 
resource-group 17-03-2026-v1

## 1. maak de container registry aan
az acr create --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --name graphxmafacr --sku Basic --admin-enabled true

## 2. images pushen: 
az acr login --name graphxmafacr

docker tag graphxmaf-graph-mcp graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest
docker tag graphxmaf-salesforce-mcp graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest

docker push graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest
docker push graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest

## 3 Container apps anameken

### 3.1 Container apps env maken: 

az containerapp env create --name graphxmaf-env --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --location norwayeast


### 3.2 dan de 2 apps

```txt
az containerapp create --name graph-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --environment graphxmaf-env --image graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest --registry-server graphxmafacr.azurecr.io --target-port 8000 --ingress external
az containerapp create --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --environment graphxmaf-env --image graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest --registry-server graphxmafacr.azurecr.io --target-port 8001 --ingress external
```

### 3.3 staan nu live op azure: 
```bash
curl https://graph-mcp.calmsea-ac909996.norwayeast.azurecontainerapps.io/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource
curl https://salesforce-mcp.calmsea-ac909996.norwayeast.azurecontainerapps.io/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource
```


## 4 entra app id

az ad app create --display-name "Graph MCP Server" --sign-in-audience AzureADMyOrg

uit output hiervan: "appId": "57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed"

identifier url: 
az ad app update --id 57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed --identifier-uris "api://57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed"

scope: 
az ad app update --id 57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed --set api.oauth2PermissionScopes='[{"id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001","adminConsentDescription":"Access Graph MCP as user","adminConsentDisplayName":"access_as_user","isEnabled":true,"type":"User","userConsentDescription":"Access Graph MCP","userConsentDisplayName":"access_as_user","value":"access_as_user"}]'
dis shit werkt niet dus zet json in file: 
```json
{
    "api": {
        "oauth2PermissionScopes": [
            {
                "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
                "adminConsentDescription": "Access Graph MCP as user",
                "adminConsentDisplayName": "access_as_user",
                "isEnabled": true,
                "type": "User",
                "userConsentDescription": "Access Graph MCP",
                "userConsentDisplayName": "access_as_user",
                "value": "access_as_user"
            }
        ]
    }
}

```

az rest --method PATCH --url "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/applications/0b51c071-2991-47d1-b881-a28cbd44ac2e" --body "@body.json"




- service pricipal aanmaken voor graph mcp: 
az ad sp create --id 57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed


###  dan nu zelfde stappen voor salesforce

az ad app create --display-name "Salesforce MCP Server" --sign-in-audience AzureADMyOrgo
  "appId": "786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448",

az ad app update --id 786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448 --identifier-uris "api://786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448"

```json
{
    "api": {
        "oauth2PermissionScopes": [
            {
                "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002",
                "adminConsentDescription": "Access Salesforce MCP as user",
                "adminConsentDisplayName": "access_as_user",
                "isEnabled": true,
                "type": "User",
                "userConsentDescription": "Access Salesforce MCP",
                "userConsentDisplayName": "access_as_user",
                "value": "access_as_user"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```
az rest --method PATCH --url "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/applications/06fadadd-a797-4df6-a7db-c565defe0a16" --body "@body.json"

az ad sp create --id 786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448



## client app registration main
az ad app create --display-name "GraphXMAF Client" --sign-in-audience AzureADMyOrg --public-client-redirect-uris "https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient"
>   "appId": "d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f",


- toestemming geven om de mcp servers aan te roepen
```json
{
    "requiredResourceAccess": [
        {
            "resourceAppId": "57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed",
            "resourceAccess": [
                {
                    "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
                    "type": "Scope"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "resourceAppId": "786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448",
            "resourceAccess": [
                {
                    "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002",
                    "type": "Scope"
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
```

az rest --method PATCH --url "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/applications/02763576-48b6-4933-9660-d5a3fb8a014a" --body "@body.json"

- admin consent geven zodat meteen werkt: 
az ad app permission admin-consent --id d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f


### overzicht van nu
app                             appid                                   wat
AppAppIdRolGraphXMAF Client     d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f    main.py — vraagt tokens aan
Graph MCP Server                57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed    Ontvangt tokens, praat met MS Graph
Salesforce MCP Server           786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448    Ontvangt tokens, praat met Salesforce

## easy auth for some reason
> valideer elk binnenkomend request tegen deze app registration en deze tenant." Plak de output hier.
az containerapp auth microsoft update --name graph-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --client-id 57eca228-88b9-485f-9f65-98e13aedb6ed --issuer "https://login.microsoftonline.com/e2726756-3dde-4452-ab19-8fe6fd170f92/v2.0" --yes

az containerapp auth microsoft update --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --client-id 786a1d46-8f6a-41c8-ac6c-566cfffb1448 --issuer "https://login.microsoftonline.com/e2726756-3dde-4452-ab19-8fe6fd170f92/v2.0" --yes

## Nu de Salesforce secrets instellen op de SF MCP Container App:
$key = Get-Content salesforce.key -Raw

az containerapp secret set --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --secrets sf-private-key="$key"
az containerapp update --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --set-env-vars SF_CLIENT_ID=<jouw sf consumer key> SF_USERNAME=<jouw sf username> SF_PRIVATE_KEY=secretref:sf-private-key



## fixes 
- client app niet ingesteld als public client
az ad app update --id d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f --is-fallback-public-client true

az containerapp auth update --name graph-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --unauthenticated-client-action AllowAnonymous
az containerapp auth update --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --unauthenticated-client-action AllowAnonymous

zat hier ng twa mis
az containerapp update --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --set-env-vars MCP_RESOURCE_URI=https://salesforce-mcp.calmsea-ac909996.norwayeast.azurecontainerapps.io
az containerapp update --name graph-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --set-env-vars MCP_RESOURCE_URI=https://graph-mcp.calmsea-ac909996.norwayeast.azurecontainerapps.io

docker compose build
docker tag graphxmaf-graph-mcp graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest
docker tag graphxmaf-salesforce-mcp graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest
az acr login --name graphxmafacr
docker push graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest
docker push graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest

az containerapp update --name graph-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --image graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/graph-mcp:latest
az containerapp update --name salesforce-mcp --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --image graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest



docker tag graphxmaf-salesforce-mcp graphxmafacr.azurecr.io/salesforce-mcp:latest



graph multi tenant maken zodat met iedere user kan inloggne: 
az ad app update --id d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f --sign-in-audience AzureADMultipleOrgs

# in copilot shit: 

az bot create --resource-group 17-03-2026-v1 --name graphxmaf-bot --app-type MultiTenant --appid d250d2e1-7695-4f52-8d5f-1de0816d649f --endpoint "https://<jouw-bot-container-app-url>/api/messages"
